responses.summary: Silence hint command made fresh-install-safe. hooks/instructions-loaded-check.sh:187 now prints `mkdir -p "$DUAL_CACHE_DIR" && touch "$DUAL_ACK_FILE"` (was bare `touch`). The bare `touch` failed on hosts where `~/.cache/sdlc-wizard/` doesn't yet exist (a fresh consumer install never creates it until the version-cache fetch — the dual-install nudge can fire before that ever happens). Regression test test_instructions_hook_dual_install_silence_hint_works_when_cache_dir_absent (tests/test-hooks.sh) deletes the cache dir, runs the hook, captures the printed `Keep both:` command, executes it via bash -c, and asserts both rc=0 AND that `$DUAL_CACHE_DIR/dual-channel-acknowledged` was created. test-hooks.sh now 134/134 PASS (was 133).
